name: Creamy Swiss Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together cooked chicken (diced or shredded), diced green chiles, mild green chili salsa, sour cream, and 1 teaspoon salt.
2. In a pie plate, mix heavy cream and 1 teaspoon salt.
3. Dip each tortilla in the cream mixture, fill with the chicken and chile mixture, and roll up tightly. Place in an ungreased baking dish.
4. Pour any remaining cream over the enchiladas and top with grated Swiss cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20-30 minutes.
Use 7-8 ounce cans of green chiles and mix the remaining chiles and salsa with extra cream before pouring over the enchiladas.
